title: 客户催单和紧急订单
theme: 从 urgent order / push factory / fastest schedule 开始
goals: 能在客户催单时先安抚客户，再说明会立即核实
能表达 push factory、expedite 和 priority，但不乱承诺结果
能给客户 realistic timeline，并持续 keep you posted

review.title: Day 16 复习
items: 昨天练了 final confirmation、order summary、production details、approved artwork、packing method 和 production start。
今天进入开产后的催单场景：客户希望提前、要求加急、追问最快时间。
处理催单时，不能只说 no problem 或 we will hurry。要安抚、核实、推动，并给现实可执行的时间线。

preview.scenario: 客户说订单很急，希望提前出货或马上确认最快生产排期。你需要稳住客户，同时和工厂核实能否加急、是否能优先处理、最快什么时候能给准确回复。
needToKnow: urgent order 表示客户时间压力大，但不代表你可以随便承诺提前。
push factory 和 expedite 表示你会推动和加急，但最好加上 I will check / I will try。
realistic timeline 比随口说 soon 更专业，能保护你和工厂的可信度。

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户需要比正常时间更快完成的订单。
vocabulary.example: I understand this is an urgent order for you.

vocabulary.usage: 用于向客户说明你会主动跟工厂确认和推进。
vocabulary.example: I will push the factory and update you today.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认工厂最早能完成生产或出货的时间。
vocabulary.example: I will check the fastest schedule with our production team.

vocabulary.usage: 用于正式表达尽量加快生产、样品、文件或出货流程。
vocabulary.example: We will try to expedite the production for you.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明某个订单或事项被优先处理。
vocabulary.example: We will treat this order as a priority.

vocabulary.meaning: 赶工生产 / 加急生产
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求比正常生产周期更快完成，但需评估风险。
vocabulary.example: Rush production may increase the quality risk, so we need to confirm carefully.

vocabulary.usage: 用于避免乱承诺，给客户一个实际可执行的时间安排。
vocabulary.example: I want to give you a realistic timeline after checking with our factory.

vocabulary.usage: 用于承诺会持续更新客户进度，语气自然商务。
vocabulary.example: I will keep you posted once I get the latest update.

sentences.label: 安抚紧急订单
sentences.natural: I understand this is an urgent order for you.
sentences.business: I understand this is an urgent order for you, and I will check the fastest schedule with our production team.

sentences.label: 承诺推动工厂
sentences.natural: I will push the factory and update you today.
sentences.business: I will push the factory to check the fastest possible schedule and update you today.

sentences.label: 避免乱承诺
sentences.natural: Let me check first before I confirm the date.
sentences.business: Let me check with our production team first so I can give you a realistic timeline.

sentences.label: 说明加急风险
sentences.natural: Rush production may increase the quality risk.
sentences.business: Rush production may increase the quality risk, so we need to confirm carefully before changing the schedule.

sentences.label: 持续更新客户
sentences.natural: I will keep you posted once I get the latest update.
sentences.business: I will keep you posted and share the latest progress as soon as I receive the factory update.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太空泛，没有说明你会催谁、确认什么、什么时候更新客户。
chatAnalysis.better: I will push the factory and update you today.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: I will push the factory to check the fastest possible schedule and update you today.

chatAnalysis.problem: maybe 太不确定，ship earlier 又容易被客户理解成承诺提前出货。
chatAnalysis.better: Let me check first before I confirm the date.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Let me check with our production team first so I can give you a realistic timeline.

chatAnalysis.problem: 客户听起来会以为一定能加急，但你还没有和工厂确认。
chatAnalysis.better: I understand this is urgent, and I will check the fastest schedule.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: I understand this is an urgent order for you, and I will check the fastest schedule with our production team.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户要求尽快确认时间

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: This order is very urgent. Can you finish earlier?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand this is an urgent order for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check the fastest time.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the fastest schedule with our production team and update you today.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：推动工厂但不乱承诺

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you promise delivery one week earlier?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Let me check with our production team first so I can give you a realistic timeline.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We really need it earlier.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will push the factory to check the fastest possible schedule and keep you posted.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：解释加急风险

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please rush production. Quality is not a problem.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We will try to expedite it, but rush production may increase the quality risk.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Then what can you do?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We will treat this order as a priority and confirm the safest fastest schedule with our factory.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：客户催单、要求提前并追问最快排期

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, this order is very urgent. Can you finish it earlier?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand this is an urgent order for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our customer is pushing us, so we need the goods as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand the pressure. Let me check the fastest schedule with our production team first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you promise delivery one week earlier?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I do not want to promise before checking, because I want to give you a realistic timeline.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please push your factory. This is very important.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will push the factory to check the fastest possible schedule and update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you put our order first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will ask our production team if we can treat this order as a priority.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If you rush production, can it be finished faster?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Rush production may help, but it may also increase the quality risk if we compress the process too much.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Quality is also important, but time is very tight.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will try to expedite it while keeping the necessary quality checks.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: When can you give me a clear answer?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will check with production, packing, and the warehouse today, then give you the latest update before the end of the day.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you also check if partial delivery is possible?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, I will check if we can finish part of the goods first and dispatch them earlier.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: That would help a lot.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will include this option when I discuss the fastest schedule with our factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please keep me updated. I need to report to my customer.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. I will keep you posted once I get the latest update.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If you cannot finish earlier, please tell me honestly.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will give you the real situation and the most realistic timeline after checking.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. We just need a clear answer.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will push the factory now and update you today with the fastest safe schedule.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我理解这对您来说是一个紧急订单。
exercises.answer: I understand this is an urgent order for you.
acceptable: i understand this is an urgent order for you
i understand that this is an urgent order for you

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：we will hurry
exercises.answer: I will push the factory to check the fastest possible schedule and update you today.
acceptable: i will push the factory to check the fastest possible schedule and update you today
i will push the factory and update you today
exercises.hint: 要说明 push factory、check schedule、update today。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Let me check first so I can give you a realistic ____.
exercises.hint: realistic timeline 是现实可行的时间线。

exercises.prompt: 客户问能否提前一周交货，哪个回复更专业？
options: Let me check with our production team first so I can give you a realistic timeline.
exercises.answer: Let me check with our production team first so I can give you a realistic timeline.
acceptable: let me check with our production team first so i can give you a realistic timeline

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们会尽量加急，但赶工生产可能会增加质量风险。
exercises.answer: We will try to expedite it, but rush production may increase the quality risk.
acceptable: we will try to expedite it but rush production may increase the quality risk
we will try to expedite production but rush production may increase the quality risk
exercises.hint: expedite 是加急处理，rush production 是赶工生产。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Please keep me updated. I need to report to my customer. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Of course. I will keep you posted once I get the latest update.
acceptable: of course i will keep you posted once i get the latest update
i will keep you posted once i get the latest update
exercises.hint: keep you posted 是持续告知进展。

homework: 把 urgent order、push factory、fastest schedule、expedite、priority、rush production、realistic timeline、keep you posted 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 realistic timeline 和 keep you posted。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户要求提前一周出货，你要安抚、说明会 push factory、检查 fastest schedule，并避免直接承诺。
tomorrow: Day 18 会练生产延误的专业解释，包括延误原因、影响、补救动作和新时间表。
